name: thomas-codex-workflows
summary: Personal Codex hooks for repo safety, PR creation reminders, and native worktree setup.
purpose: Use this plugin to enforce repo safety around shell commands and prepare native Codex worktrees.
whenToUse: Guard risky shell commands and remind about review gates before PR creation.
Copy ignored secrets, environment files, and a relocatable virtualenv into new native worktrees.

safety.authModel: Uses local command state such as git and gh without publishing credentials.
safety.writeModel: Hooks may block risky commands or update local worktree metadata, but do not publish remote changes by themselves.

installNotes: Hooks rely on the Codex compatibility variable for plugin root resolution.
This plugin is machine-local behavior, not a source of secrets or project memory.
